zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Beaumont於1313年3月10日出生在英國越可爾博爾頓 珀西時，他的父親Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris43歲，母親Alice Comyn24歲。他於1340年與Eleanor de Beauchamp在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓史道威 豪斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年在英國英格蘭戴文享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Beaumont于1313年3月10日出生在英国越可爾博爾頓 珀西时，他的父亲Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris43岁，母亲Alice Comyn24岁。他于1340年与Eleanor de Beauchamp在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓史道威 豪斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年在英国英格兰戴文享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Beaumont was born on 10 March 1313, in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, was 43 and his mother, Alice Comyn, was 24. He married Eleanor de Beauchamp in 1340, in Stowe House, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1347, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Beaumont est né le 10 mars 1313, à Bolton Percy, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice Comyn, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Beauchamp en 1340, à Stowe House, Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1347, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Beaumont am 10. März 1313 in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris 43 und seine Mutter Alice Comyn 24. Er hat 1340 in Stowe House, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England Eleanor de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1347 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Beaumont è nato il il 10 marzo 1313 nel Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Alice Comyn, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Beauchamp nel 1340, nel Stowe House, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1347, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Beaumontが1313年3月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ペルシで生まれた時，父Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxorisは43歳，母Alice Comynは24歳であった。1340年にイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンストウ ホーウゼでEleanor de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年にイギリスイギリスデボンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Beaumont(이)가 1313년 3월 10일 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Comyn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 코른월 킬카프턴 스타우 허스에서 Eleanor de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Beaumont nasceu em 10 de março de 1313, em Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice Comyn, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Beauchamp em 1340, em Stowe House, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1347, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Beaumont родился 10 марта 1313 г. в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Comyn, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Beauchamp в 1340 г. в местности стоу хоус, килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1347 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Beaumont nació el 10 de marzo de 1313, en Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Alice Comyn, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Beauchamp en 1340, en Stowe House, Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1347, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
